rationale: Cross-channel comparator exchanges cross_channel_state_t via SPI
Safe state manager broadcasts safe_state_active to all components
Departure interlock module sends departure_interlock_ok to TCI
CAN speed receiver reads tcms_speed_msg_t from TCI
Interlock generator writes speed_interlock_active for SKN
Interlock generator writes speed_interlock_active for DSM
Obstacle sensor reader reads hal_obs_sensor_a/b arrays
Obstacle detector writes obstacle_flags array for DSM
Obstacle detector writes obstacle_flags array for SKN cross-channel
Door FSM engine writes door_states and lock_states arrays for SKN
Sensor voter reads hal_pos_sensor and hal_lock_sensor arrays
Lock controller writes lock actuator commands via HAL API
Motor controller writes PWM duty and direction via HAL API
Door FSM engine provides per-door status to TCI status formatter
Mode manager receives door commands from TCI command parser
Fault aggregator writes fault_flags bitmask for SKN
Fault classifier sends fault report to TCI for CAN transmission
Safe state escalator sends fault log entries to DGN
CAN receiver writes tcms_speed_msg_t for SPM consumption
CAN transmitter receives departure interlock from SKN for TX
CAN transmitter receives fault report from FMG for TX
Command parser sends door open/close commands to DSM
Status formatter receives per-door status from DSM for CAN TX
Event log writer receives fault log entries from FMG
Event log writer accesses SPI Flash via HAL SPI driver
GPIO driver writes hal_pos_sensor and hal_lock_sensor arrays
GPIO driver writes hal_obs_sensor arrays and ISR flags
GPIO driver provides implicit watchdog status to SKN
PWM driver receives motor PWM commands from DSM motor controller
CAN driver provides RX buffer for TCI CAN receiver
CAN driver transmits status messages formatted by TCI
SPI driver exchanges cross_channel_state_t between channels
SPI driver provides Flash access for DGN event log
TCI CAN receiver gets TCMS speed from external CAN bus
TCI CAN transmitter sends door status to external TCMS
SKN comparator uses external SPI hardware for channel link
HAL GPIO driver reads external position sensors
HAL GPIO driver reads external lock sensors
HAL GPIO driver reads external obstacle sensors
DSM lock controller commands external lock actuators via HAL
DSM motor controller commands external motor PWM via HAL
HAL provides watchdog refresh to external IWDG hardware
DGN event log uses SPI Flash for diagnostics port access
cross_channel_state_t structure transmitted over SPI hardware
tcms_speed_msg_t structure received from CAN hardware
door_status_msg_t structure transmitted to CAN hardware
event_log_entry_t structure stored in SPI Flash
CRC-16-CCITT (0x1021) applied to SPI cross-channel frames
CRC-16-CCITT (0x1021) applied to CAN RX speed messages
CRC-16-CCITT (0x1021) applied to CAN TX status messages
